compatibility_rules: archive compatibility claims are only published for the checked-in windows-x64 package and install surface
portable archive installer archive and offline bundle must resolve to the same runnable payload family
toolchain presence does not widen archive or install compatibility claims by itself
release-operations metadata must not publish host or channel compatibility outside the checked-in package-channel set
toolchain_range_rules: the current milestone does not publish a multi-major LLVM or Clang compatibility range
new LLVM or Clang major lines remain unclaimed until replayable package and install evidence lands on the public workflow path
toolchain-range evidence must be narrower than local executable discovery
forbidden_claims: archive publication implies installer or update compatibility on every host
